timeline.title: How it works
timeline.subtitle: From request to clear commercial access — 5 simple steps

steps.title: Quote request
steps.desc: Fill in our online form or give us a call. Free, no-obligation quote with a fast response.

steps.title: Contract & planning
steps.desc: We set up your seasonal contract and register your address in our automatic dispatch system.

steps.title: Weather monitoring
steps.desc: Our team monitors forecasts 24/7. As soon as snowfall is expected, we schedule your intervention.

steps.title: Rapid response
steps.desc: Our crews arrive after every storm. Parking lots and commercial access cleared to keep your operations running.

steps.title: Report & satisfaction
steps.desc: Notification sent after each intervention. If you're not satisfied, we come back free of charge within 24h.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The key answers before booking your snow removal service.

items.question: What is the Innes East special offer?
items.answer: Businesses in the Orléans Industrial Park sector and on Innes East benefit from preferential rates. Contact us for details.

items.question: When do you come after a storm?
items.answer: We schedule visits based on accumulation and contract priority. Interventions usually start during or shortly after the storm, depending on conditions.

items.question: Do you offer seasonal contracts?
items.answer: Yes. Seasonal contracts cover the full winter period and remove the need to call after every snowfall.

items.question: What types of businesses do you serve?
items.answer: We offer commercial snow removal in Orléans only: parking lots, retail, offices and industrial areas.

items.question: Do you work during business hours?
items.answer: Yes. We schedule visits according to your operating hours to minimize impact on clients and staff.
